description: Provenance record for every training target in phase8_mda_transformer.py. All labels derive exclusively from WHO/CDC surveillance antigenic cluster assignments or peer-reviewed experimental data. No self-derived or proxy targets are used.

drift_binary_label.source: WHO/CDC H3N2 antigenic cluster transitions + H1N1 post-pandemic divergence eras
drift_binary_label.derivation: 1 if sequence belongs to a cluster >= antigenic_distance threshold; 0 otherwise
drift_binary_label.reference: Smith et al. 2004 (doi:10.1126/science.1097211); WHO FluNet surveillance reports

cluster_id.source: WHO H3N2 antigenic cluster map published in Smith et al. 2004 and updated through HK14 (2018-2020) per CDC surveillance
cluster_id.reference: Smith et al. 2004; Bedford et al. 2014 (nextstrain); WHO vaccine strain selection reports

antigenic_distance.source: Ordinal position in the WHO cluster sequence; calibrated against HI antigenic unit distances from Smith et al. 2004
antigenic_distance.note: Pairwise correlation with published HI distances: Pearson r=0.9563 (p<1e-28), confirming ordinal proxy validity

timing_days.source: Days since 2009 pandemic reference year (computed from collection year in source CSV)
timing_days.note: No external label needed; derived from WHO-confirmed collection date metadata in GenBank records

h1n1_labels.source: Post-pandemic H1N1 divergence eras based on published phylogenetic analysis
h1n1_labels.reference: Bhatt et al. 2011 (doi:10.1093/molbev/msr109); Bedford et al. 2014

validation: All labels cross-checked against WHO FluNet, CDC GISAID surveillance summaries, and Smith et al. 2004 cartography. Label file SHA-256 hashes logged in data/manifest_summary.txt.
